title: epipactis albensis
intro: Epipactis albensis, also known as the snow-orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epipactis albensis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
